bot.name: AcademicITBlockBot
bot.fallback_message: Sorry, I couldn’t understand your request. Please ask about HODs, lecturers, labs, or classrooms.

training_phrases: Who is the HOD of IT?

response.text: The HOD of the IT Department is Mr. Jagdhish Chandra Pandey.
response.location: Right-hand side from the entrance, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block

training_phrases: Who is the HOD of CSE?

response.text: The HOD of the CSE Department is Mr. Manmohan.
response.location: Left-hand side from the entrance, second room, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block

training_phrases: Who is the HOD of Electronics?

response.text: The HOD of the ELEX Department is Mr. Manoj Rikhari.
response.location: From the entrance, take the left staircase and reach in front of the cabin, 1st Floor, Academic IT Block

response.text: CSE lecturers are Mr.Virendra Dharamshaktu and Mr. Neeraj Arya.
response.location: Left-hand side from the entrance, second room, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block

response.text: IT lecturers are Ms.Neha Bohra and Mr.Ashok Kumar.
response.location: Left-hand side from the entrance, third room, Ground Floor, Academic IT Block

response.text: ELEX lecturers are Mr.Pankaj Kumar and Mr.Rashid

training_phrases: Where is the CSE lecturer cabin?

response.text: CSE lecturers' cabins are located on the Ground Floor.
response.location: Left-hand side from the entrance, second room, Academic IT Block

training_phrases: Where is the IT lecturer cabin?

response.text: IT lecturers' cabins are located on the Ground Floor.
response.location: Left-hand side from the entrance, third room, Academic IT Block

training_phrases: Where is the ELEX lecturer cabin?

response.text: ELEX lecturers' cabins are located on the 1st Floor.
response.location: From the entrance, take the left staircase and reach the cabins on the left second and third room, Academic IT Block

response.text: The CSE Lab is located on the Ground Floor.
response.location: From the entrance, walk straight; the CSE Lab is on the right-hand side, Academic IT Block

response.text: The IT Lab is located on the 3rd Floor.
response.location: From the entrance, walk straight and take the stairs; the IT Lab is on the left-hand side, Academic IT Block

response.text: The ELEX Lab is located on the 1st Floor.
response.location: From the entrance, take the left staircase, turn left, walk straight; the lab is on the right-hand side, Academic IT Block

response.text: Classrooms are arranged department-wise and year-wise.
